Package org.eventb.internal.core.pog

Class AbstractEventGuardList

java.lang.Object

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<IAbstractEventGuardTable>
    getAbstractEventGuardTables()
    Returns the list of abstract event guard tables
    List<ISCEvent>
    getAbstractEvents()
    Returns the list of SC abstract events corresponding to the guards
    ISCEvent
    getFirstAbstractEvent()
    Returns the first abstract event from the list corresponding to the guards, or null if the list is empty.
    IAbstractEventGuardTable
    getFirstAbstractEventGuardTable()
    Returns the first abstract event guard table from the list corresponding to the guards, or null if the list is empty.
    int
    getRefinementType()
    Returns the type of refinement of the current event, one of INTRO, MERGE, SPLIT.
    IStateType<?>
    getStateType()
    Returns the type of this state.
